structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating State Sequence – Discharge Temperature Reset (0-50%)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 0% to 50% heating-loop output, reset discharge temperature setpoint from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Active airflow setpoint is the heating minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating and heating-loop output between 0% and 50%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Discharge temperature setpoint resets from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Active airflow setpoint = heating minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. From 0 % to 50%, the heating -loop output shall reset the discharge temperature setpoint  from the current AHU SAT setpoint  to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint . The active airflow setpoint  shall be the heating minimum  endpoint .

evidence_quote: 5.6.5.3. When the Zone State  is heating , the Heating Loop  shall maintain space  temperature at the heating
